# Education Strategy Guide

## Adaptive Learning
Adaptive learning tailors content placement and difficulty to the learner's needs. It uses assessment data and engagement patterns to personalize instruction. Adaptive systems can improve retention, pacing, and learning outcomes when designed well.

## Curriculum Design
Curriculum design organizes learning goals, content sequence, and assessments into a coherent experience. Good design aligns instruction with desired competencies and real-world relevance. It also supports consistency across instructors and grade levels.

## Student Retention
Student retention focuses on keeping learners engaged until they achieve their goals. Institutions monitor attendance, engagement, and support needs to identify students at risk. Early intervention improves completion rates and institutional performance.
